home.title: WCPOS
home.subtitle: A fast point of sale for WooCommerce

features.title: What's included in Pro?
features.subtitle: Everything in Free, plus the tools to run your whole store from the register — and priority support when you need a hand.

terminal.title: Payment Terminal Integration
terminal.description: Connect card readers and payment terminals for fast, accurate in-person payments.

stockPrice.title: Stock & Price Editing
stockPrice.description: Update stock levels, prices, and product details right from the POS — no trip to the WordPress admin.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Browse order history, open past orders, and manage them without leaving the register.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Add and edit customer details at the point of sale, kept in sync with WooCommerce.

reports.title: End-of-Day Reports
reports.description: Close the register with end-of-day summaries of sales, payments, and takings.

gateways.title: Custom Payment Gateways
gateways.description: Take payments with any WooCommerce-compatible gateway, not just the built-in options.

buyBox.heading: Get Pro
buyBox.subheading: One license, all features. Just pick how long you want updates.

lifetime.title: Lifetime
lifetime.subtitle: Updates forever
lifetime.ctaNote: About {years} years of Yearly — then $0 forever.

buyBox.tryFreeSuffix: — upgrade once you know it does the job
buyBox.proof: 5,000+ active stores · Yearly credits toward Lifetime
buyBox.unavailableDescription: Pricing information is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

freePlugin.question: Is the free plugin limited?
freePlugin.answer: No. The free WCPOS plugin is GPL software with full point of sale features — unlimited products, orders, and customers, and no transaction fees. Pro adds the advanced tools listed above.

yearlyVsLifetime.question: What's the difference between Yearly and Lifetime?
yearlyVsLifetime.answer: The Yearly license is a one-time payment that includes updates and priority support for one year. It does not renew automatically. The Lifetime license is a one-time payment that includes updates forever.

upgrade.question: Can I upgrade from Yearly to Lifetime?
upgrade.answer: Yes! Contact our support team and we'll credit the remaining time on your Yearly license towards a Lifetime license.

siteLimits.question: How many sites can I use my license on?
siteLimits.answer: Each license can be activated on multiple sites. Check your account dashboard for activation limits.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and Bitcoin.

metadata.title: Checkout

complete.title: Thank you for your purchase!
complete.description: Your license key and download link have been sent to your email.

account.emailHint: We'll create your account with this email — your license and receipt arrive here after purchase.
account.existingAccountNotice: Welcome back — you already have an account. Enter your password to sign in and continue.
account.oauthSuffix: — you'll come straight back to checkout.

errors.passwordFailed: That password didn’t work. If you signed up with Google, GitHub or Discord, use the sign-in link below instead — or reset your password from the sign-in page.
errors.createFailed: Could not create your account. Please try again.

payment.noneConfigured: No payment methods are configured. Please contact support.

paypal.hint: Pay with your PayPal balance or linked card

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin

paypalButton.loadFailed: Failed to load PayPal. Please try another payment method.

errors.initializeFailed: Unable to initialize checkout. Please try again.

errors.methodSwitchFailed: We couldn't prepare that payment method. Please try again or choose a different one.

errors.genericCardFailed: Your card could not be charged. Please check your card details, or try a different card or payment method.

errors.orderPending: Your payment was received, but we couldn't finish creating your order. Please do not pay again — contact support and we will finish your order or refund the payment.
errors.paypalFailed: PayPal couldn't complete your payment. You have not been charged — please try again or use a different payment method.
errors.paypalInitFailed: We couldn't start the PayPal checkout. Please try again or use a different payment method.
errors.paypalCancelled: PayPal checkout was cancelled and you have not been charged. You can try again whenever you're ready.
errors.btcpayInitFailed: We couldn't start the Bitcoin payment. You have not been charged — please try again or use a different payment method.

stripeDeclines.insufficientFunds: Your card was declined due to insufficient funds. Please use a different card or payment method.

stripeCodes.cardDeclined: Your card was declined. Please try a different card or payment method.
stripeCodes.expiredCard: Your card has expired. Please use a different card.
stripeCodes.incorrectCvc: Your card's security code is incorrect. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidCvc: Your card's security code is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.incorrectNumber: Your card number appears to be invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidNumber: Your card number appears to be invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidExpiryMonth: Your card's expiry date is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.invalidExpiryYear: Your card's expiry date is invalid. Please check it and try again.
stripeCodes.processingError: Something went wrong while processing your card. You have not been charged — please try again.
stripeCodes.authenticationFailure: We couldn't verify your card with your bank. Please try again or use a different payment method.
stripeCodes.authenticationRequired: We couldn't verify your card with your bank. Please try again or use a different payment method.

recovery.switchMethod: You can also choose a different payment method below.

unknown.title: Payment status unknown
unknown.suffix: and quote reference <reference></reference> — we will confirm whether your payment went through before you pay again.

orderPending.resetConfirm: Only reset checkout after support confirms it is safe to try again. If your payment is still pending, resetting could lead to a second payment.
orderPending.title: Payment received — order pending
orderPending.description: Your payment went through, but we hit a problem while creating your order.
